testsuite.name: javaollama.PdfServiceTest
testsuite.system-err: [Test worker] WARN org.apache.pdfbox.pdmodel.font.FileSystemFontProvider - COMMONS-LOGGING 53 new fonts found, font cache will be re-built [Test worker] WARN org.apache.pdfbox.pdmodel.font.FileSystemFontProvider - COMMONS-LOGGING Building on-disk font cache, this may take a while [Test worker] WARN org.apache.pdfbox.pdmodel.font.FileSystemFontProvider - COMMONS-LOGGING Could not load font file '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/noto/NotoColorEmoji.ttf': 'loca' table is mandatory [Test worker] WARN org.apache.pdfbox.pdmodel.font.FileSystemFontProvider - COMMONS-LOGGING Finished building on-disk font cache, found 53 fonts
